channel.title: Project on Elkana Lang'at
channel.description: Recent content in Project on Elkana Lang'at

item.title: AWS IAM Automation Framework
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Automated IAM policy lifecycle management at scale using Terraform, reducing policy drift and improving least-privilege enforcement across 50+ AWS accounts.

item.title: Zero Trust Azure Landing Zone
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Designed and deployed a Zero Trust network architecture for Azure cloud platform serving 300+ users, implementing microsegmentation, identity-based access, and continuous verification.

item.title: Compliance-Driven DevSecOps Pipeline
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Built automated security and compliance pipeline for CI/CD workflows, achieving continuous SOC 2 and ISO 27001 compliance with zero manual audit evidence collection.
